entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop targeted for hybrid breeding to enhance genetic gains.

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The tendency of a crossbred individual to show qualities superior to those of both parents.

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where a plant cannot produce functional pollen, essential for hybrid seed production.

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The process of restoring fertility in hybrid offspring.

entities.name: SELFING
entities.description: The process of self-pollination in plants.

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of breeding two different varieties or species.

entities.name: GENETIC GAINS
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a population over time due to selection.

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: The process of crossing two genetically diverse parents to create superior hybrid offspring.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where significant pearl millet breeding efforts have occurred.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region providing germplasm for pearl millet breeding.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region providing germplasm for pearl millet breeding.

entities.name: SEED PARENTAL LINES
entities.description: Parental lines used as seed parents in hybrid breeding.

entities.name: RESTORER PARENTAL LINES
entities.description: Parental lines used to restore fertility in hybrid breeding.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species.

entities.name: HETEROTIC POOLS
entities.description: Groups of breeding lines that exhibit high heterosis when crossed with lines from a different pool.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms such as pests and diseases.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by non-living factors such as drought or salinity.

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific traits or locations on a chromosome.

entities.name: PRODUCT PROFILES
entities.description: Defined characteristics and goals for the final crop variety in a breeding program.
